Title: Validating Legacy GPUs for Local LLM Inference

Introduction:
Legacy GPUs are still widely used in various industries, including finance, healthcare, and e-commerce. However, with the increasing demand for AI-powered applications, the need for GPUs has become more critical. In this note, we will discuss the process of validating legacy GPUs for local LLM inference.
